findings.message: New scrape job 'redis' added (targeting redis-exporter:9121) with no corresponding alert rules or dashboard panels. This creates a production observability gap.
findings.suggestion: Add redis alert rules (e.g., redis-down check) to infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml and create a redis.json dashboard in infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/. Also verify redis-exporter service is defined in the appropriate compose file.
